textByHash.6c18e539b906ca655b6c52f0106fbc59ea963acb: Shhh! Don't disturb the sacred eels.
textByHash.adaea5b2614c1b8a480d5ec3533e5ff639339065: As Zulrah's skin is shed, the scales fall to the bottom of the swamp, where I believe the eels are permitted to consume them. Thus the eels become sacred, dumb though they are.
textByHash.052e3c4d3702c8ce3262451871de3264ecf943bf: Then the mighty Zulrah sends the eels to us. Once you eat of them, and absorb their sacred properties yourself, you become part of our tribe forever - no other community will let you in.
textByHash.7fc2b6538fec797dc29fe42ed6cc565e8e16ca86: Zul-Cheray and her younger son are due for an extra large ration of eels when her older son is sacrificed, so I can't spare any for you.
textByHash.e5f18cc33a92d85c2036a064721362140b2de5bd: All the same, after your sacrifice is complete, Zulrah will return for Zul-Cheray's son, and she will want her eels at that time.
textByHash.76874ade52af866a5ab315878101880d98c736a0: The mighty Zulrah sends us the eels as part of a sacred contract with our tribe, as the High Priestess told you. Although you are not of our tribe, Zulrah may be willing to grant you eels too. You may try.
textByHash.2d8af1e9474bf4867004d5f376eef839ff0e0612: You know nothing of the sacred contract between our tribe and the mighty Zulrah! Ask the High Priestess to educate you about Zulrah before you meddle further.
textByHash.fbc056e44aaeb7762b44c9dd9cfd72fd0f2dcb4c: Ignorant tourist! The mighty Zulrah sends us the eels as part of a sacred contract with our tribe - you know nothing of these matters. Ask the High Priestess to educate you about Zulrah first.
